steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content:
The blank separates the noun “This hypothesis” from the dependent clause “that certain trees, such as P. sylvestris, survived without interruption or human intervention throughout the Holocene”.

The sentence's main verb “cannot stand” comes after this dependent clause.

This arrangement requires the blank to contain a form that creates a complete noun phrase to serve as the subject of the main verb.

steps.title: Apply the participial form
steps.content:
The present participle suggesting forms the noun phrase “This hypothesis suggesting that certain trees, such as P. sylvestris, survived”, which functions as the subject of “cannot stand”.

Finite verb forms like suggests, suggested, and has suggested would establish their own main clauses instead of modifying the noun.

That is the correct answer.
